items.title: [vim-security] Out-of-bounds Read in Terminal Screen Snapshot in Vim < 9.2.565
items.summary:
Posted by Christian Brabandt on May 30 Out-of-bounds Read in Terminal Screen Snapshot in Vim < 9.2.565 
================================================================ 
Date: 30.05.2026 
Severity: Medium 
CVE: *requested, not yet assigned* 
CWE: Out-of-bounds Read (CWE-125) 
 
## Summary 
The `update_snapshot()` function in `src/terminal.c` copies the visible 
terminal screen into the scrollback buffer when a snapshot is taken.  For 
each screen cell it walks the cell's `chars[]` array.
